message:
feat(cli): Implement fcp policy simulate command

Add the policy simulation CLI module for previewing DecisionReceipts
without executing operations:

PolicyArgs/PolicyCommands:
- Define CLI structure with simulate subcommand
- Support input from file or stdin ("-")

SimulateArgs:
- --input: Path to PolicySimulationInput or InvokeRequest JSON
- --json: Output format flag (default true)

run_simulate():
- Read input from file or stdin
- Parse as PolicySimulationInput or fallback to InvokeRequest
- Call fcp_core::simulate_policy_decision()
- Output DecisionReceipt JSON or error details

Input flexibility:
- Full PolicySimulationInput with zone_policy + invoke_request
- Bare InvokeRequest (synthesizes permissive zone policy)

This enables operators to test policy outcomes before deployment,
debug approval workflows, and validate configuration changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
